title: Fred Boas
compiled_truth: Fred Boas is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2002-05-13), Fred Boas sent 10 and received 199 emails, totalling 209 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (10), [Howard Camp](people/howard-camp) (4), [Robert Lloyd](people/robert-lloyd) (3), [Tom Acton](people/tom-acton) (3), [Aimee Lannou](people/aimee-lannou) (3).
